skills.name: run-projects
skills.description: Use when running DHB local frontend projects across cash-mini, dhb-mobile-index, new_mobile_h5, customize-mini-program, or linked subpackages, especially when switching environments, linking local packages, or recovering from unstable startup flows.
skills.whenToLoad: Load when dhb-packages task matches this skill trigger.

skills.name: restore-local-env
skills.description: 恢复 DHB 本地联调环境。触发词：恢复环境、恢复配置、结束开发、还原配置。用于停止统一执行器启动的进程并恢复其备份的配置文件。
skills.whenToLoad: Load when dhb-packages task matches this skill trigger.

skills.name: dhb-env-switch
skills.description: 切换 DHB 本地开发环境（测试/预发/线上）。触发词：切环境、切线上、切测试、切预发。
skills.whenToLoad: Load when dhb-packages task matches this skill trigger.

skills.name: add-mobile-icon
skills.description: 在 dhbfront-img 项目中新增图标。触发词：新增图标、添加图标、创建图标、添加 svg 图标。支持固定颜色图标和主题色图标，支持任意模块目录（goods、order、payment 等）。
skills.whenToLoad: Load when dhb-packages task matches this skill trigger.
